title: Retail Investor Enthusiasm Surges in April-May 2025: Tickeron’s FLM Platform Steers the Wave
author: tickeron_community
selftext: The spring of 2025 has been a whirlwind for U.S. equity markets, with retail investors driving unprecedented buying activity. On May 19, 2025, JPMorgan reported that retail traders purchased $4.1 billion in U.S. stocks by 12:30 PM, marking the largest intraday retail inflow on record. This frenzy follows a remarkable April, when retail investors poured $40 billion into equities—an all-time monthly high. Amid this fervor, Tickeron’s AI-powered FLM (Financial Language Model) platform is helping investors navigate the volatile landscape with disciplined, data-driven strategies.
